question: What are the most valuable AQAL-aligned KPIs for a founder running three concurrent ventures (AOB, BuilderBee, Centaurion.me), and how should they map to the Centaurion Routing Gate thresholds?
metric: per-quadrant leading indicators + one composite Precision Ratio proxy
sources: Ken Wilber — A Theory of Everything (AQAL primary source)
Integral Institute — lines of development literature
Karl Friston — Free Energy Principle papers
iteration_plan: 1. Map AQAL four quadrants to founder activities (UL/UR/LL/LR examples per venture)
2. Identify 3-5 measurable leading indicators per quadrant (12-20 total)
3. Weight indicators by novelty-of-signal and routing-relevance
4. Propose composite Precision Ratio proxy combining indicators
5. Draft instrumentation plan (where each KPI comes from: Outlook, Drive, CRM, git, self-report)

ties_to.purpose: Research feeds the quantitative scoring layer of the deep AQAL assessment
